name: react-responsive-pagination
title: Responsive Pagination
author: jonelantha
description: Chooses the widest pagination composition that fits its measured container.

changes: Added a use client directive so the hook-based source installs inside a Next.js client boundary.
Wrapped the upstream list in a localized nav landmark and added an explicit direction prop with direction-aware previous and next defaults.
Replaced the Bootstrap-oriented default class tokens with local Tailwind layout, 44-pixel target, active, disabled, and focus-visible classes while retaining the upstream class override API.
Corrected local TypeScript import specifiers to the actual copied .tsx file extensions so source-copy runtimes resolve them.
Corrected local TypeScript import specifiers to the actual copied .tsx file extension so source-copy runtimes resolve it.
Corrected a local TypeScript import specifier to the actual copied .tsx file extension so source-copy runtimes resolve it.
Corrected local TypeScript import specifiers to the actual copied .tsx file extensions so source-copy runtimes resolve them.

modifications.change: Added the client directive, labeled nav wrapper, explicit direction-aware defaults, local Tailwind interaction classes, and resolvable .tsx import specifiers.
modifications.reason: Provide the documented Next.js portability, semantic, localization, RTL, touch-target, focus-visible, and source-copy resolution adaptations without changing the measured composition algorithm.

modifications.change: Corrected labelBehaviour import specifiers from .ts to the copied .tsx extension.
modifications.reason: Make the exact source closure executable after source-copy installation.

modifications.change: Corrected the useWidestComposition import specifier from .ts to the copied .tsx extension.
modifications.reason: Make the exact source closure executable after source-copy installation.

modifications.change: Corrected useFoutDetector and useWidthCalculator import specifiers from .ts to their copied .tsx extensions.
modifications.reason: Make the exact source closure executable after source-copy installation.
